parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.TAVILY_API_KEY, query: $json.topic + ' ' + ($json.key_points || '').substring(0, 200), search_depth: 'advanced', max_results: 8, include_answer: true, include_raw_content: false }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a professional executive briefing specialist. Generate comprehensive, well-researched PowerPoint slide content based on the provided research data. Each slide should have substantive, specific bullets with real facts, numbers, and actionable insights — NOT generic filler. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate ' + $json.slide_count + ' slides for a PowerPoint presentation.
Title: ' + $json.title + '
Agency/Organization: ' + $json.agency + '
Audience: ' + $json.audience + '
Topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'General briefing') + '
Key points to cover: ' + ($json.key_points || 'Cover comprehensively') + '

WEB RESEARCH DATA (use this for real facts and specifics):
' + ($json.research || 'No research available') + '

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Use the research data above to fill slides with REAL facts, numbers, requirements, and specifics
- Each slide should have 4-6 substantive bullets
- Include a Sources slide at the end citing the research URLs
- Make it presentation-ready for ' + $json.audience + '

Return ONLY this JSON (no markdown):{"slides":[{"title":"slide title","bullets":["bullet 1","bullet 2","bullet 3","bullet 4"]},...]}' }] }) }}
